summary: Iteration 90: Comprehensive testing of Doggy Service Desk - All features working correctly. Login, ticket list, ticket detail with conversation (no TypeError), Context/Files/History tabs, Settings modal, New Ticket modal, Send Reply, file upload, AI draft, analytics, pets sidebar, pet parents sidebar all verified.

minor.issue: Returns 404 - endpoint not implemented (non-critical, used for optional channel intake data)
Returns 404 - endpoint not implemented (non-critical, used for optional stay booking data)
WebSocket connection shows 'Reconnecting...' - real-time updates may not work but core functionality unaffected

console_warnings.issue: WebSocket connection timeout - shows 'Reconnecting...' in Settings modal. Real-time updates may not work but all other features function correctly.

login.details: Admin login with aditya/lola4304 works correctly via /api/admin/login

ticket_list.details: 94 tickets displayed with correct counts (58 Open, 0 In Progress, 1 Resolved)

ticket_detail_click.details: Clicking on a ticket shows conversation WITHOUT TypeError - main bug fix verified

conversation_tab.details: Shows message thread with replies, internal notes (highlighted in yellow), timestamps

context_tab.details: Shows pet parent info (name, email, phone)

files_tab.details: Tab loads correctly, file upload endpoint works

history_tab.details: Tab loads correctly, shows order history when available

settings_modal.details: Shows Custom Ticket Statuses (6 statuses: New, In Progress, Waiting on Member, Escalated, Resolved, Closed) and Custom Categories/Pillars (15 pillars)

new_ticket_modal.details: Shows 4 ticket types (Support request, General question, Reservation, Shop order), Pillar selector, Priority options (Low/Medium/High/Urgent/Critical), contact fields (Name, Email, Phone, Pet Name), Create Ticket button

send_reply.details: Reply sent successfully, appears in conversation thread with 'Just now' timestamp

analytics_endpoint.details: Returns proper analytics data (total_tickets, open_tickets, resolved_tickets, by_category, by_priority)

pillar_filtering.details: Care filter shows 25 tickets, Travel filter shows 31 tickets - filtering works correctly

channel_filtering.details: Channel dropdown available with All Channels option

priority_filtering.details: Priority dropdown available with All Priorities option

backend_api_tests.details: 20/20 pytest tests passed - all ticket APIs working

critical_code_review_comments: WebSocket connection for real-time updates is not working (shows 'Reconnecting...'). This is a non-critical issue as all core functionality works without real-time updates.
seed_data_creation: Created TEST_Iter90 prefixed tickets and replies via API and UI testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Service Desk is fully functional. All requested features verified: 1) Login works, 2) Ticket list shows 94 tickets with filtering by pillar/channel/priority, 3) Clicking ticket shows conversation WITHOUT TypeError (bug fixed), 4) All 4 tabs work (Conversation, Context, Files, History), 5) Settings modal shows custom statuses and categories, 6) New Ticket modal has all fields, 7) Send Reply works, 8) File upload works, 9) AI draft generation works, 10) Analytics endpoint returns proper data, 11) Pets sidebar shows 21 pets, 12) Pet Parents sidebar shows 23 members. WebSocket for real-time updates shows 'Reconnecting...' but this doesn't affect core functionality.

login.details: Admin login with aditya/lola4304 via Service Desk login page

ticket_list_display.details: 94 tickets displayed with status badges, pillar icons, timestamps

ticket_click_no_typeerror.details: MAIN BUG FIX VERIFIED - Clicking on ticket shows conversation without TypeError

context_tab_pet_parent_info.details: Shows pet parent name, email, phone

history_tab_order_history.details: Tab loads, shows order history when available

settings_modal.details: Custom Statuses (6) and Custom Categories/Pillars (15) visible

new_ticket_modal.details: 4 ticket types, pillar selector, priority options, contact fields, Create Ticket button

send_reply.details: Reply sent and appears in conversation

analytics_endpoint.details: Returns total_tickets, open_tickets, resolved_tickets, by_category, by_priority

pillar_filtering.details: Care (25 tickets), Travel (31 tickets), Dine (16), Stay (5)
